steps.observed: Fresh page loaded with default DAI prefilled

steps.action: Fill price-token input with unknown address 0x00000000000000000000000000000000000000b1
steps.observed: Address entered
Modal appeared with title 'Unknown Token', message about address not in any enabled tokenlist, and three buttons: 'Save to Local List', 'Continue', 'Reject'

evidence.network: No network request made (modal intercepts before fetch)

assertions.title: Modal save adds to local tokenlist

steps.action: Fill bucket-token input with unknown address 0x00000000000000000000000000000000000000b2
steps.observed: Address entered
Unknown Token modal appeared with Save/Continue/Reject

steps.expected: Token saved to localStorage, request proceeds
steps.observed: Modal dismissed, bucket form shows 'Checking...' (request proceeded)
localStorage.localTokens = [{"chainId":1,"address":"0x00000000000000000000000000000000000000b2","symbol":"Unknown","name":"Unknown Token","decimals":18}]

evidence.localStorage: localTokens contains saved token with chainId=1, address=0x...00b2

steps.action: With unknown address 0x...00b1 in price-token, click 'Get Price'
steps.observed: Unknown Token modal appeared
Modal dismissed, button changed to 'Fetching...', 'Fetching price...' message shown
localTokens=null, tokenlists=null (unchanged)

steps.action: With unknown address 0x...00b1 in price-token, click 'Get Price'
steps.observed: Unknown Token modal appeared

steps.expected: Modal dismissed, form not submitted, focus returns to token input
steps.observed: Modal dismissed, no price result shown, Token Address input has [active] state (focus confirmed via accessibility snapshot), no 'Fetching...' indicator

evidence.focusBehavior: Focus returned to token input (confirmed via [active] attribute in accessibility snapshot)

steps.action: After saving token 0x...00b2 via Save modal (VAL-AUTO-007)
steps.observed: Token confirmed in localStorage
Dropdown shows 'Unknown — Unknown Token (0x0000...00b2)' with source 'Local Tokens'

evidence.autocomplete: Saved token appeared in dropdown labeled as 'Local Tokens'

steps.observed: Dropdown shows 'DAI — Dai Stablecoin (0x6B17...1d0F)' from 'Uniswap Labs Default'
Input filled with 0x6B175474E89094C44Da98b954EedeAC495271d0F
Price Result: Chain=ethereum, Token=0x6B17...1d0F, Block=24574945, Price=1 USD, Cached=no

steps.action: Reject: Click Reject on unknown token modal
steps.observed: Token Address input received [active] state (confirmed via accessibility snapshot in VAL-AUTO-009)

steps.action: Continue: Click Continue on unknown token modal
steps.observed: Form submitted (Fetching... shown), modal dismissed cleanly (VAL-AUTO-008)

steps.action: Save: Click Save on unknown token modal
steps.observed: Form submitted, classification result displayed immediately (bucket=null for fake token), modal dismissed cleanly

evidence.focusBehavior: Reject: focus returns to token input. Save/Continue: form proceeds to completion. All three dismiss modal cleanly with no orphaned UI elements.

frictions.description: First price fetch for an unknown/non-contract address takes 30+ seconds due to RPC calls, making it slow to verify that Continue/Save actually trigger the fetch. The fetch for 0x...00b1 via Continue eventually returned 502 (Chain backend is unavailable) which is expected for fake addresses.
frictions.resolution: Used screenshot evidence of 'Fetching...' state and localStorage checks to confirm behavior without waiting for full response

frictions.description: Autocomplete 'No matches' dropdown can intercept clicks on buttons below it (e.g. Check Bucket button). Required pressing Escape to dismiss dropdown before clicking the button.
frictions.resolution: Press Escape to close autocomplete dropdown before clicking submit buttons

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. VAL-AUTO-006 (modal trigger), VAL-AUTO-007 (save to local list), VAL-AUTO-008 (continue without saving), VAL-AUTO-009 (reject cancels), VAL-CROSS-004 (saved token in autocomplete), VAL-CROSS-005 (full E2E search-select-price flow with DAI returning $1), VAL-CROSS-007 (focus management after all three modal actions). All modal behaviors work correctly: Save adds to localStorage and proceeds, Continue proceeds without saving, Reject cancels and returns focus to input.
